Formerly: SPHL498F.

PHYS - Physics

PHYS401 Quantum Physics | (4 Credits)

Introduces some quantum phenomena leading to wave-particle duality. Schroedinger theory for bound states and scattering in one dimension. One-particle Schroedinger equation and the hydrogen atom. Prerequisite: PHYS371; and (PHYS313 or PHYS373).
